title: Opinion: Opinion | US' Scott Bessent Has A New 'Doctrine', And It Leaves India With Hard Choices
summary_full: Scott Bessent in a recent WSJ opinion piece has explained the so-called American economic 'statecraft'. The doctrine should raise concerns in India.
summary_public: Scott Bessent in a recent WSJ opinion piece has explained the so-called American economic 'statecraft'. The doctrine should raise concerns in India.
